name: taskyard
description: Agent-first todo. Markdown files and an MCP server.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @taskyard/dashboard && npm run build -w taskyard
scripts.dev: npm run build:cli-only && concurrently -n api,ui -c cyan,magenta "node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --no-open" "npm run dev -w @taskyard/dashboard"
